ars_astrologique.glyph_desc.glyph_alacri: Grants increased overall speed to the target. Beware the lethargic backlash once the spell ends.
ars_astrologique.glyph_desc.glyph_bless: Grants increasing healing to the target for the duration.
ars_astrologique.glyph_desc.glyph_empowe: Grants increased physical strength for melee attacks and jumping power to the target.
ars_astrologique.glyph_desc.glyph_false_: Grants faux vitality to the target for a short duration.
ars_astrologique.glyph_desc.glyph_invigo: Passively recovers target's hunger and saturation.
ars_astrologique.glyph_desc.glyph_stalwa: Turns the target into an immovable guardian. Grants increased damage and knockback reduction at the cost of slower movement speed.
ars_nouveau.augment_desc.glyph_alacrity_: Increases overall speed at the cost of a harsher backlash when the spell ends.
ars_nouveau.augment_desc.glyph_bless_gly: Amplifies incoming healing to the target.
ars_nouveau.augment_desc.glyph_empower_g: Increases melee damage, knockback, and jumping strength.
ars_nouveau.augment_desc.glyph_false_lif: Increases the amount of temporary health granted.
ars_nouveau.augment_desc.glyph_invigorat: Amplifies the target's passive hunger and saturation recovery.
ars_nouveau.augment_desc.glyph_stalwart_: Increases damage and knockback resistance at the cost of even slower movement.
ars_astrologique.page1.enchanter_charm: Hailing from far away in the universe, some Enchanters now find themselves stranded in our world with no means of returning. Thus, they do their best to scavenge and barter with trustworthy mages to gather enough resources to return home. You can earn their trust by handing them over a Blank Parchment which they will bind themselves to to be called upon when needed.
ars_astrologique.page2.enchanter_charm: Enchanters were known for their magical prowess, but they seem to have lost their spellcasting as of now. Wonder if they're working on it...
ars_astrologique.page3.enchanter_charm: Summon an Enchanter by using an Enchanter Charm on a block. Make sure you've made their surroundings safe, or else they may wander off and get lost forever.
ars_astrologique.page4.enchanter_charm: Enchanters will trade an assortment of magical goodies, gear, and resources in exchange for Source Gems. Most will be happy to help you upgrade your gear too, only asking a small fee and a reagent to enchant. If Ars Additions is installed, Enchanters can teach you unknown glyphs via Ancient Codices on sale. If Ars Ingressum is installed, they can even attune a tuning fork!
ars_astrologique.page5.enchanter_charm: Enchanters love magical snacks, like Source Berries, Source Berry Rolls, and the occasional Bastion Fruit. When offered one to eat, their minds may be spurred to invent new items and refresh their wares.
